skill.name: qwen-image-pro
skill.description: Generate images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Professional text rendering, fine-grained realism, enhanced semantic adherence. Ideal for posters, banners, and text-heavy designs.
skill.summary: Generate professional images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model via inference.sh CLI. Best for text rendering and complex designs.
skill.author: toolshell

security_audit.summary: All 56 static findings are false positives. The skill is a documentation wrapper for the inference.sh CLI that calls Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro API. Shell command patterns (infsh app run) are example usage in markdown code blocks, not actual code execution. Hardcoded URLs point to the legitimate inference.sh service. No security issues found.

content.user_title: Generate Professional Images with Qwen-Image Pro
content.value_statement: Create stunning professional images with Alibaba Qwen-2.0-Pro model. Perfect for text-heavy posters, marketing banners, and designs requiring precise text rendering.
actual_capabilities: Generate images with Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model via inference.sh CLI
Create professional text-heavy designs with precise text rendering
Generate multiple image variations in a single request
Apply style transfer and image editing with reference images
Control reproducibility with seed parameters for consistent results
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI (infsh) to be installed
Total pixels must be between 512×512 and 2048×2048

use_cases.title: Create Text-Heavy Marketing Materials
use_cases.description: Design professional posters and banners with precise text rendering. Specify fonts, colors, sizes, and positioning for exact results.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing professionals and designers creating promotional content

use_cases.title: Generate Consistent Brand Assets
use_cases.description: Use seed parameters to generate reproducible images for consistent brand materials across multiple outputs.
use_cases.target_user: Brand managers and content creators needing consistent visuals

use_cases.title: Create Custom Illustrations
use_cases.description: Generate unique illustrations with fine-grained realism and strong semantic adherence to complex prompts.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and developers needing custom visuals

prompt_templates.title: Basic Text-to-Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image with the prompt: [YOUR PROMPT HERE]. Use default settings.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick image generation with basic settings

prompt_templates.title: Custom Size Poster
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [WIDTH]x[HEIGHT] poster with the prompt: [YOUR PROMPT]. Set prompt_extend to false for precise control.

prompt_templates.title: Multiple Variations
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate [NUMBER] variations of an image with the prompt: [YOUR PROMPT]. Include negative_prompt: [AVOID_THESE].
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating multiple options to choose from

prompt_templates.title: Reproducible Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image with seed [SEED_NUMBER] using the prompt: [YOUR PROMPT]. Set width: [WIDTH], height: [HEIGHT], prompt_extend: false.

output_examples.input: A futuristic cityscape at sunset with flying cars
output_examples.output: A detailed image of a futuristic city with flying vehicles, sunset lighting, and modern architecture

output_examples.input: Professional marketing banner with "SUMMER SALE" in white on gradient sunset background, "50% OFF" in yellow below
output_examples.output: A clean marketing banner with the specified text elements, colors, and modern design

output_examples.input: Minimalist logo design for a coffee shop called "Bean & Brew" with 4 variations
output_examples.output: Four unique minimalist logo concepts for the coffee shop brand

best_practices: Use quotes around exact text you want rendered: "Title: \"Hello World!\""
Disable prompt_extend for precise control over the generated image
Include negative prompts to avoid common issues like blurry or distorted text
anti_patterns: Avoid prompts longer than 800 characters as they will be truncated
Do not exceed the 512×512 to 2048×2048 pixel constraint
Avoid vague prompts - the model works best with specific, detailed descriptions

faq.question: How do I install the inference.sh CLI?
Do I need an account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to sign up at inference.sh and run infsh login

faq.question: What image sizes are supported?
faq.answer: Images must be between 512×512 and 2048×2048 pixels

faq.question: Can I generate multiple images at once?
faq.answer: Yes, use num_images parameter (1-6 images per request)

faq.question: How do I get consistent results?
faq.answer: Use the seed parameter to reproduce the same image with the same seed value

faq.question: What is prompt_extend?
faq.answer: When enabled, the model rewrites your prompt for better results. Set to false for precise control.
